name: cross-agent-reviews
description: State-driven cross-agent spec/plan review pipeline. Single `/cr` command advances the active pipeline; .cross-agent-reviews/<slug>/ persists state across rounds and hosts.

interface.longDescription: Single /cr command advances the active review pipeline. Reads .cross-agent-reviews/<slug>/state.json, dispatches the next round (1a → 1b → 2a → 2b → 3a → 3b → 3c), terminating early when round 3a is clean and running final verification 3c only when round 3b corrects accepted blockers. Audit rounds (1a/2a/3a) and verification round 3c require fresh sessions; settle rounds (1b/2b/3b) do not. Supports cross-host paste-import. Terminates with READY_FOR_IMPLEMENTATION (clean 3a or 3b rejects all) or CORRECTED_AND_READY (3c passes).
